raw_consumer_statement:
I opened a Citi credit card in XXXX and had excellent credit for many years. In XXXX, I discovered unauthorized charges on my card. I did not recognize these charges and reported them to Citi approximately a month and a half after they occurred. Despite notifying them promptly, Citi refused to take action, claiming that because the card was physically in my possession, I was responsible for the charges. 

I explained the situation in detail and requested a proper investigation or documentation, but Citi declined to help. Eventually, they charged off the account and reported it as delinquent to the credit bureaus, damaging my credit. I also filed a dispute with XX/XX/XXXX ( report XX/XX/XXXXXXXX ) but the account remains on my report. 

I am seeking CFPBs assistance in having this charge-off removed and holding Citi accountable for refusing to resolve this legitimate case of fraud.
